operator_as_variable.description: Enable ChkTeX warning 35 (operator-as-variable: an operator name like 'sin' in math should be \sin). When false, the plugin passes -n 35 to chktex so the class never fires.

script_grouping.description: Enable ChkTeX warning 25 (sub/superscript grouping: 'x^10' should be 'x^{10}'). When false, the plugin passes -n 25 to chktex so the class never fires.

lint_rules.description: House-style user-regex rules rendered into ChkTeX UserWarnRegex entries (warning 44). Each rule's pattern is a PCRE regex fed to the real chktex; its message is the verbatim text surfaced on the diagnostic. The plugin generates a chktexrc with one UserWarnRegex per rule — there is NO app-owned regex engine.

pattern.description: A PCRE regular expression compiled by the real chktex (UserWarnRegex). A pattern chktex cannot compile is a LOUD plugin error.

message.description: The verbatim diagnostic message surfaced for a match.

severity.description: Optional diagnostic severity. Defaults to warning when omitted.
